meaning: n.杩囧幓瀹屾垚鏃禷dj.杩囧幓瀹屾垚鏃剁殑
examples: We ought to use the pluperfect and say wakened, but woke is better and was always used by Peter.
I would argue that it was pluperfect obviously disabled the banks and the major investment banks.
Sagesse longingly calls him plus-que-parfait (pluperfect), as if he might have been a whole soul in a past life.
